tool_cards.title: Context Pack Builder
tool_cards.summary: A service component that assembles source-backed signals, curated knowledge, data limits, and verification steps for one agent task.
tool_cards.agent_fit: Useful when an agent needs compact task-specific context before planning.
tool_cards.install_hint: Expose as a read-only hosted MCP tool before adding write-back or private tenant data.
data_limits: Internal Newswiki implementation template; not external market evidence.

tool_cards.title: Manual A/B Eval Runner
tool_cards.summary: A lightweight evaluation workflow that prepares baseline and Newswiki-context prompts for the same task.
tool_cards.agent_fit: Useful before deciding whether Newswiki context actually changes an agent's recommendation.
tool_cards.install_hint: Run `python eval\prepare_ab_run.py eval\tasks\001-skill-mcp-positioning.json` and paste prompts into fresh agent sessions.
data_limits: Internal Newswiki evaluation workflow; not external market evidence.
